title: Sanji Plays Mr. Prince
description: On pages 9–12, sanji plays mr. prince as sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues.
scene: Sanji Plays Mr. Prince. Sanji discovers Mr. 3’s hideout and uses a Den Den Mushi call to mislead Crocodile while the fight on Little Garden continues. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: That's it! Why didn't I realize sooner!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: If it can turn into mist, then that means it can melt!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Luffy! That guy's candlewax can be melted with fire!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: No matter how hard his wax is, wax is still wax!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry?
dialogue.text: And the same goes for them too! Master Brogy too! It hasn't been that long since they hardened up! We can still save them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fufu...! Even if you know, you still won't be able to win nor have enough time to save your friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You only have about 30 seconds before their hearts completely stop beating!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Right now, they're painfully struggling inside their minds with the last bit of consciousness they have, all the while edging closer to death!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll save you now! CERTAIN KILL FLAME'S...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Didn't you hear him say that you won't be able to win either?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Damn it! I don't have much time left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Listen up. Take this rope and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What are you secretly scheming over here? Mind letting me in on the secret?

summary: This part centers on sanji plays mr. prince, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
